title: Rename device - restart the app
scenario: Renamed device name does not persist after killing and restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a Bluetooth audio device connected.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, tap the General tab.
4. Tap on the device's official name field to edit it.
5. Enter a new custom name for the device.
6. Tap Done to save the new name.
7. Force close (kill) the Poly Studio Mobile app.
8. Relaunch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
9. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → General tab.
10. Observe the device name displayed in the General tab.
expected: The renamed device name persists and is displayed correctly in the General tab after restarting the app.
